name: adventureforge
description: AI-authored, deterministic text-adventure engine. Stages 0–5: deterministic core, CYOA, Zork-style parser, Sierra-Quest scoring, Hero's-Quest RPG, and a React web UI.

scripts.format:check: prettier --check src bin scripts agents tests ui
scripts.format: prettier --write src bin scripts agents tests ui
scripts.lint: eslint src bin scripts agents tests ui
scripts.health: npm run verify:integrity && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run validate -- content/cyoa/pack/watchtower_road.yaml && npm run validate -- content/cyoa/pack/clockwork_heist.yaml && npm run validate -- content/cyoa/pack/wreckers_light.yaml && npm run validate -- content/cyoa/pack/white_stag.yaml && npm run validate -- content/cyoa/pack/dead_reckoning.yaml && npm run validate -- content/cyoa/pack/tithe_barn.yaml && npm run validate -- content/cyoa/pack/midnight_edition.yaml && npm run validate -- content/cyoa/pack/ferrymansprice.yaml && npm run validate -- content/cyoa/pack/night_dispensary.yaml && npm run validate -- content/parser/pack/sealed_crypt.yaml && npm run validate -- content/parser/pack/alchemists_tower.yaml && npm run validate -- content/parser/pack/cellarmans_dark.yaml && npm run validate -- content/parser/pack/friars_postern.yaml && npm run validate -- content/parser/pack/lamplighters_round.yaml && npm run validate -- content/parser/pack/tide_mill.yaml && npm run validate -- content/rpg/pack/sunken_barrow.yaml && npm run validate -- content/rpg/pack/cold_forge.yaml && npm run validate -- content/rpg/pack/dawn_beacon.yaml && npm run validate -- content/rpg/pack/wolf_winter.yaml && npm run validate -- content/rpg/pack/breaking_weir.yaml && npm run validate -- content/rpg/pack/gallowmere.yaml
scripts.author: tsx bin/author.ts
